title: Getting Started with Web Development
excerpt: A beginner-friendly guide to HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — the three pillars of every website on the internet.
excerptCn: 一篇适合初学者的 HTML、CSS 和 JavaScript 指南——构建互联网上每个网站的三大基石。

title: The Art of Minimalism in Design
titleCn: 设计中的极简主义艺术
excerpt: Why less is more — exploring how removing unnecessary elements leads to clearer, more effective designs.
excerptCn: 为什么少即是多——探讨去除不必要的元素如何带来更清晰、更有效的设计。

title: Building a Morning Routine That Works
excerpt: How I designed a simple morning routine that boosted my productivity and mental clarity throughout the day.
excerptCn: 我如何设计了一套简单的晨间习惯，从而提升了一整天的工作效率和思维清晰度。

title: Understanding Git Branches
excerpt: A visual guide to Git branching — merge, rebase, and the workflows that teams actually use in practice.
excerptCn: 一份关于 Git 分支的可视化指南——合并、变基以及团队在实践中真正使用的工作流。

title: My Favorite Books of 2025
excerpt: A roundup of the five books that stayed with me long after the last page — spanning fiction, science, and philosophy.
excerptCn: 五本读完后让我久久难以忘怀的书——涵盖小说、科学和哲学。

title: Why I Switched to a Static Site Generator
titleCn: 我为何转向静态网站生成器
excerpt: After years of running WordPress, I moved to a static site. Here's why it was the best decision for my blog.
excerptCn: 使用 WordPress 多年后，我转向了静态网站。这是我为何认为这是博客最佳选择的理由。

title: CSS Container Queries Are Here
excerpt: Responsive design just got a lot more powerful. Learn how container queries let components adapt to their own size, not just the viewport.
excerptCn: 响应式设计变得更加强大了。了解容器查询如何让组件根据自身尺寸而非视口来适应。

title: Designing for Accessibility from Day One
titleCn: 从第一天起就为无障碍而设计
excerpt: Accessibility isn't an afterthought or a checklist — it's a design philosophy that makes products better for everyone.
excerptCn: 无障碍不是事后补救，也不是检查清单——而是一种让产品对每个人都更好的设计理念。

title: The Case for Boring Technology
titleCn: 为什么应该使用“无聊”的技术
excerpt: New frameworks are exciting, but boring, well-understood tools ship more reliable products. Here's why I choose predictability over novelty.
excerptCn: 新框架令人兴奋，但枯燥、已被充分理解的工具能交付更可靠的产品。这就是我为何选择可预测性而非新奇。
